title: Moderation Queue Update — 2026-04-28
body:
The following actions were taken after reviewing all open abuse reports:

BAN: spam_wave_42 — Distributed phishing links across 6 channels in 20 minutes. Zero tolerance for phishing; account permanently removed.

FORMAL WARNING: toxic_runner — Repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. This is an official warning; the next violation will result in a ban.

WARNING: bot_like_user_77 — Suspicious pattern of near-identical automated replies in help channels. Account is under monitoring.

FRIENDLY WARNING: new_member_17 — Off-topic post in #introductions. Please review channel guidelines.

NO ACTION: Reports against trusted_helper and core_maintainer were reviewed and closed. The dispute report against trusted_helper was a single-user disagreement with no policy violation. The high-severity report against core_maintainer was identified as a coordinated false-report brigading attempt following a legitimate moderation decision.

All 6 reports are now resolved. Thank you to everyone who submitted reports — your vigilance keeps this community safe.
